description: Shared Renovate preset for Feld Hugo-on-Vercel sites. Scope is deliberately Hugo-only: the npm manager is disabled wholesale, then ONLY hugo-extended is re-enabled (unconditionally), plus the hugo-common git submodule. Smoke-gated automerge for minor/patch. All other npm deps (build/migration tooling like typescript/tsx/turndown, runtime libs like @noble/*) are intentionally ignored — these are static sites whose npm tail does not ship to readers; GitHub's native Dependabot security alerts cover CVEs on any runtime libs.

packageRules.description: Allowlist scope: disable ALL npm deps by default (manager match only, so scoped names like @types/node are covered).
Re-enable hugo-extended UNCONDITIONALLY (no matchUpdateTypes — must apply at extraction so the dep is not pruned before an update is known).
Hugo minor/patch: automerge once the smoke check passes
Hugo major: open the PR only (human look — breaking-change risk)
hugo-common submodule: automerge once the smoke check passes
